center.name: 弗林德斯山脈
center.summary: 弗林德斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Purple-crowned lorikeet、东尖嘴吸蜜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The purple-crowned lorikeet is found in southwest Western Australia, and in southern South Australia, east from the southern Eyre Peninsula, through the Gawler Ranges and southern Flinders Ranges and across Victoria to East Gippsland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Eastern spinebills are found in dry sclerophyll forest, scrub and heathland from the Cooktown area in North Queensland south through New South Wales east of the Great Dividing Range, through Victoria and into the Flinders Ranges in eastern South Australia as well as throughout Tasmania.Pizzey, Graham; Doyle, Roy (1980) A Field Guide to the Birds of Australia

links.evidence: The purple-crowned lorikeet is found in southwest Western Australia, and in southern South Australia, east from the southern Eyre Peninsula, through the Gawler Ranges and southern Flinders Ranges and across Victoria to East Gippsland
